name: ChromaDB
description: Open-source embedding database for local and cloud AI apps. Simple API for storing, querying, and filtering embeddings. First choice for RAG prototyping.

skills.name: Store embedding vectors with associated documents and metadata in local collections

skills.name: Query collections by embedding similarity with built-in distance function support

skills.name: Filter results by metadata fields using a Pythonic where clause syntax

skills.name: Embed documents automatically using built-in or custom embedding functions
skills.description: Embed documents automatically using built-in or custom embedding functions
